message:

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "traefik-1007-support-failover-load-balancing",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "traefik: Support Failover Load-balancing",
+    "description": "Support Failover Load-balancing. Requested by 40+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current traefik deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your traefik version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nhelm list -n traefik 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working traefik installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review traefik configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant traefik configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get configmap -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=traefik\n```\n### What version of Traefik are you using (`traefik version`)?\nv1.1.2\n\n### What is your environment & configuration (arguments, toml...)?\nlinux, simple file backend\n\n```toml\n[backends]\n  [backends.testing]\n    [backends.testing.servers.server1]\n   "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Failover Load-balancing",
+        "description": "### What does this PR do?\n\nThis pull request adds a Failover service type. This service allows forwarding the requests sent to the `main` service to the `fallback` service when the `main` service is not available anymore (failing health checks).\n\n### Motivation\n\nFix #1007\n\n### More\n\n- [X] Added/updated tests\n- [X] Added/updated documentation\n\n### Additional Notes\n\nCo-authored-by: Kevin Pollet <pollet.kevin.com>\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n traefik -l app.kubernetes.io/name=traefik\nkubectl get events -n traefik --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support Failover Load-balancing\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### What does this PR do?\n\nThis pull request adds a Failover service type. This service allows forwarding the requests sent to the `main` service to the `fallback` service when the `main` service is not available anymore (failing health checks).",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
